testcase.title: Verify Brands Page Load and Structure
testcase.preconditions: User is logged in and has access to VIRTO_START Demo Store

step.description: Navigate to https://virtostart-demo-store.govirto.com/brands
Wait for page to load completely
Verify page structure and elements

expected_results.result: 1. Brands page loads successfully without errors
2. Top brands section is displayed with featured brands (Apple, Mall of America, Nordstrom, ZurRose)
3. Alphabetical navigation A-Z is visible and properly organized
4. Search functionality is prominently displayed
5. Page title shows Demo - B2B-store - Brands
6. All UI elements are properly aligned and responsive

testcase.title: Test Brand Search with Full Brand Name

step.description: Locate the search textbox on brands page
Type Apple in the search box
Click the Search button
Observe the results and interface updates

expected_results.result: 1. Search executes successfully
2. Only Apple brand is displayed in results
3. Search button text updates to show Apple Search
4. Only section A is displayed, other sections are hidden
5. Alphabetical buttons are properly disabled/enabled based on results
6. Search term remains in the input field

testcase.title: Test Brand Search with Partial Name Substring

step.description: Clear any existing search terms
Type App in the search box
Click the Search button
Verify partial matching results

expected_results.result: 1. Search finds multiple brands containing App
2. Results show Apple prefix match and GRAINGER APPROVED substring match
3. Only sections A and G are displayed
4. Alphabetical buttons show only All A and G as active
5. Search is case-insensitive
6. Dynamic interface updates correctly

testcase.title: Test Search Reset Functionality
testcase.preconditions: User has performed a search on brands page

step.description: Ensure there is a search term in the search box
Clear the search box (remove all text)
Click the Search button
Verify reset behavior

expected_results.result: 1. Search box is cleared successfully
2. Full brand directory is restored
3. All alphabetical sections A-Z are displayed
4. All alphabetical filter buttons are restored to proper states
5. Complete brand listing is visible
6. URL parameters are properly managed

testcase.title: Verify Alphabetical Navigation System
testcase.preconditions: User is on brands page with full brand listing

step.description: Observe the alphabetical navigation buttons A-Z, 0-9, #
Identify which letters are active vs disabled
Note the visual indicators for each state
Verify the logic of enabled/disabled states

expected_results.result: 1. Letters with brands are clickable and properly styled
2. Letters without brands (Q, 0-9, #) are disabled and visually distinct
3. 'All' button is available for full listing
4. Visual distinction between active and inactive states is clear
5. Complete alphabet coverage A-Z is properly organized
6. Navigation is intuitive and user-friendly

step.description: Locate Apple brand in the brand listing
Click on the Apple brand link
Wait for brand page to load
Verify brand page content and functionality

expected_results.result: 1. Navigation to Apple brand page is successful
2. URL updates correctly to /Brands/apple
3. Page title updates appropriately
4. Brand-specific product catalog is displayed
5. Only Apple products are shown
6. All catalog functionality is available sorting filtering grid/list view
7. Navigation breadcrumbs are properly maintained

testcase.title: Verify Brand Page Catalog Functionality
testcase.preconditions: User is on a specific brand page eg Apple

step.description: Verify sorting options are available
Test grid/list view toggle
Check filtering options
Verify product display
Test navigation within brand catalog

expected_results.result: 1. Sorting dropdown shows all options Featured Price Alphabetical Date
2. Grid and List view buttons work correctly
3. Filter options are available Purchased before Show in stock Available at branches
4. Products displayed are only from the selected brand
5. All catalog features function correctly within brand context
6. Navigation maintains brand context

testcase.title: Test Brand Page URL and SEO Structure
testcase.preconditions: User has access to multiple brand pages

step.description: Navigate to different brand pages (Apple, Microsoft, Samsung)
Verify URL structure for each brand
Check page titles and meta information
Test direct URL access

expected_results.result: 1. URLs follow SEO-friendly format '/Brands/brand-name'
2. Brand names in URLs are properly formatted (lowercase, hyphenated)
3. Page titles reflect the brand name and context
4. Direct URL access works correctly
5. URLs are shareable and bookmarkable
6. No broken links or 404 errors

step.description: Navigate through all alphabetical sections
Count approximate number of brands
Verify brand diversity and quality
Check for major brand presence

expected_results.result: 1. Brand directory contains 200+ brands
2. Brands span multiple categories (electronics, industrial, consumer goods, food & beverage)
3. Major brands are present (Apple, Microsoft, Samsung, Nintendo, HP, Coca-Cola)
4. Geographic diversity is represented
5. Brand names are properly formatted and displayed
6. No duplicate or broken brand entries

testcase.title: Test Brand Search Performance and Responsiveness

step.description: Perform multiple searches with different terms
Measure response time for search results
Test rapid search term changes
Verify no lag or performance issues

expected_results.result: 1. Search results appear instantly without page reload
2. Real-time filtering works smoothly
3. No lag when typing or changing search terms
4. Interface remains responsive during search operations
5. No browser errors or console warnings
6. Search performs well with both short and long search terms

testcase.title: Verify Brand Page Integration with Main Navigation
testcase.preconditions: User is on a brand page

step.description: From a brand page, test main site navigation
Use top navigation menu items
Test breadcrumb navigation
Verify integration with site features

expected_results.result: 1. Main navigation remains fully functional on brand pages
2. Breadcrumb navigation shows proper hierarchy
3. Site features (cart, lists, search) work correctly
4. Brand context is maintained where appropriate
5. User can navigate back to main catalog seamlessly
6. No functionality is lost or broken on brand pages

testcase.title: Test Brand Page Mobile Responsiveness
testcase.preconditions: User has mobile device or browser developer tools

step.description: Access brand page on mobile device or simulate mobile view
Test search functionality on mobile
Verify alphabetical navigation on smaller screens
Check touch interactions

expected_results.result: 1. Brand page is fully responsive on mobile devices
2. Search functionality works correctly on touch devices
3. Alphabetical navigation adapts to mobile layout
4. Touch interactions are smooth and accurate
5. Text and buttons are appropriately sized for mobile
6. No horizontal scrolling or layout issues
